omitted_declarations.policy_reference: We use third-party analytics services, such as Google Analytics, to help understand your use of our services. These services may collect information sent by your browser or mobile device, including your IP address, device identifiers, and other diagnostic data. This data helps us improve our app and services. For example, we use this information to monitor and analyze use of the Service and for the Service's technical administration.
